# Project Guidelines

## Development Checklist
- [ ] Lint: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Build: `npm run build`
- [ ] Test: `npm run test`

## Code Style
- TypeScript for all new code
- ESLint for code quality
- TailwindCSS v4 (see [.github/instructions/tailwind-4.instructions.md](.github/instructions/tailwind-4.instructions.md))
- Frontend design: avoid generic AI aesthetics (see [.github/instructions/frontend-design.instructions.md](.github/instructions/frontend-design.instructions.md))

## Architecture
- React + Vite app
- Components in `src/components/`
- Hooks in `src/hooks/`
- Utils in `src/utils/`
- Data in `src/data/`

## Conventions
- Bingo: 5x5 grid with free center
- Components: PascalCase
- Hooks: `use` prefix</content>
